title: GC GAVENO CAVAILIA Towel Bale Set 500 GSM | 8 Piece Towel Set | 2 Hand Towel + 2 Bath Towel + 4 Face Towel | Family Pack Egyptian Cotton Towel Set | Grey
features: 500 GSM BALE SET: This grey towel bale is made of 100% ringspun cotton material. This 8 pieces towel bale set is durable and long-lasting. The size of the easy dry towel set is 4 luxury face towels 30x30 cm,2 quick dry hand towels 50x70 cm, and 2 Egyptian bath towels 66x115 cm. This beautiful high gsm towel set will make your bathroom elegant.

FAST DRY BALE SET: This towel bale set absorbs the water quickly. The 100% cotton towel set dries your body. 100% Egyptian cotton makes the towel bale bundle soft and delicate which will give you a relaxed feel.
QUICK ABSORB AND USAGE: Many hotels use luxury bathroom towel sets. You can also use an easy-care towel set in the gym during the workout. You can use a super absorbent towel at the beach.

FREE FROM HARSH CHEMICALS: The extra soft towel set is made without any harsh chemicals. No strong chemicals are used during the making procedure of an Egyptian cotton towel set. You can use purely a cotton towel without hesitation.

CARE INSTRUCTION: This extra-thick towel set is washable. You can wash the gsm towel set with a soft detergent. Wash dark-colored towels separately. Don’t iron thick towels. This towel bale should be set far away from the fire.
